hook: Are you tired of living paycheck to paycheck?
full_script: Are you tired of living paycheck to paycheck? You're not alone. Financial stress affects millions. You need a budget. Track your spending. Cut unnecessary costs. Build an emergency fund. Invest wisely. Follow for Day 2. Save this.
scene_breaks: 0s: Are you tired of living paycheck to paycheck?
15s: You're not alone. Financial stress affects millions.
